creator: mikael@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 150810
patch for libx264

The patch (files/patch-Makefile) is very FreeBSD specific, we already have the 
same patch for i386, amd64...  I don't think it'll be accepted upstream.

I've reworked the patch a bit: I've removed files/patch-configure, it is now 
replaced by "@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|gcc|${CC}|' ${WRKSRC}/configure" in the 
ports Makefile.

Here are the links to build logs for various arch/version:

http://mikael.urankar.free.fr/FreeBSD/arm/build_logs/84-amd64_libx264-0.142.2455.log
